question: What can you do if your landline is in searching status?
content:
1. Make sure the base station has power.
2. Register the handset to the base station. If you need to do it manually, select [Menu] > [Services] > [Register], press [OK], put the base station into registration mode for 5 seconds, enter the system PIN, then press [OK]. Registration should complete in less than 2 minutes.
3. Move the handset closer to the base station.
ret: "1. Make sure the base station has power.\n2. Register the handset to the base station. If you need to do it manually, select [Menu] > [Services] > [Register], press [OK], put the base station into registration mode for 5 seconds, enter the system PIN, then press [OK]. Registration should complete in less than 2 minutes.\n3. Move the handset closer to the base station.",[]
notes: No image needed; the FAQ gives the direct searching-status fixes, and the registration section supplies the manual registration details.
